query:
SELECT
            s.station_cd,
            l.average_distance,
            POINT(s.lat, s.lon) <-> POINT($1, $2) AS distance
          FROM stations AS s
          JOIN lines AS l ON l.line_cd = $3
          WHERE
            s.line_cd = $3
            AND s.e_status = 0
          ORDER BY 
            distance
          LIMIT 
            1
